label: Evidence Style
description: How explicitly the reply should anchor itself in policy or observed facts.

options.label: Policy First
options.instruction: Lead with the concrete rule, timing, or gate that explains the next step.

options.label: Case Anchor
options.instruction: Reflect the customer's specific facts before you move to the plan.

options.label: Light Touch
options.instruction: Keep the policy grounding short and avoid over-explaining the rulebook.
